name: Bank Statement
description: Bank or credit card statement. Detects IBAN, BIC/SWIFT (context-anchored), masked card numbers, full card numbers (13-19 digits), transaction references, dates, international phones, plus names, addresses, account numbers and amounts.

patterns.name: IBAN
patterns.description: International Bank Account Number — supports spaces between groups

patterns.name: BIC / SWIFT
patterns.description: BIC/SWIFT code — anchored to BIC: or SWIFT: label to avoid matching ordinary uppercase words

patterns.name: Masked card (****1234)
patterns.description: Card number with masked digits + last 4 visible

patterns.name: Full card number
patterns.description: Card number — 13 to 19 digits with optional spaces or dashes (covers Visa/MC/Amex/UnionPay)

patterns.name: Transaction reference
patterns.description: Transaction or reference ID with common prefixes — supports embedded dashes

patterns.name: International phone number
patterns.description: International phone — bounded to avoid matching inside longer numbers (IBANs, account numbers)

patterns.name: Date (any common format)
patterns.description: Dates in DD/MM/YYYY, MM/DD/YYYY, DD.MM.YYYY etc.
